title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 265.515 - Rules of director, ratification of
text:
265.515.  Rules of director, ratification of. — All rules and regulations promulgated by the director of the department of agriculture under the terms of sections 265.500 to 265.515 shall stand ratified unless rescinded by the general assembly by bill or concurrent resolution.
(L. 1975 S.B. 57 § 5) 
Rules, procedure for making and rescinding, Chap. 536
